name: Veggie Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion and mince the garlic. Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté the onions until soft, then add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
2. Dice the green and red bell peppers into 1-inch cubes and add them to the pot with the sautéed onions and garlic. Cook until the peppers are slightly softened.
3. Add the chopped jalapenos to the pot and stir gently.
4. Pour in the veggie broth (or bouillon) and mash up the plum tomatoes, adding their juice. Stir in half of the tomato paste and chili powder.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer, stirring occasionally until it thickens slightly. If desired, add more tomato paste for added flavor.
6. Reduce heat to low and stir in the remaining tomato paste. Add the red kidney beans and season with salt, pepper, cumin, and additional spices as needed.
7. Simmer the chili on low heat for about 30-45 minutes until thickened, stirring occasionally. Adjust seasoning if necessary before serving.
8. Serve the chili hot with cornbread, tortilla chips, or shredded Jack cheese, if desired.
